name: car-maintenance-dev
description: Dev tooling only. The deployed app is plain static HTML/CSS/JS; nothing here ships to GitHub Pages.

scripts.check:js: for f in app.js github-api.js state.js validation.js calculations.js dom.js views-dashboard.js views-detail.js views-history.js views-settings.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done; echo 'JS OK'
scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run check:json
